channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: OpenAI’s AI spending spree has ballooned to $750B
item.description: OpenAI will spend the equivalent of Sweden's GDP on infrastructure through 2030.

item.title: Nirvanna the Band the Show and Movie will finally be available to stream via Hulu on July 24
item.description: The recent film was a big hit, but the series wasn't available to watch anywhere.

item.title: US Army forced to reinstate limits on AI token usage after troops blew through allowances faster than expected
item.description: The US Army has reportedly pulled back its AI usage after burning through token allocations too quickly.

item.title: Nvidia tries again to get gamers to accept DLSS 5 — and doesn't entirely succeed
item.description: Nvidia shows how DLSS 5 gives developers control — but many gamers remain skeptical and accusations of 'Slopvidia' abound.

item.title: Voici Gene.01, le robot italien qui sent tout ce qui le touche
item.description: Les humanoïdes de la Silicon Valley voient tout, mais ne sentent rien. Une startup italienne prend le contre-pied avec un robot recouvert de peau sensitive, déjà promis aux chantiers navals. Et il n'a fallu que six mois.

item.title: I've watched all of Stuart Fails to Save the Universe and it's a smarter spinoff than we've given it credit for — ride through the rough first episode to reach sitcom glory
item.description: Stuart Fails to Save the Universe is the underdog of 2020s TV spinoffs, and I mean that in the best possible way. In fact, I've basically forgotten The Big Bang Theory existed.

item.title: This is why Samsung built the Galaxy Z Fold 8, a passport-sized foldable that sets ‘the new standard for viewing content’
item.description: We got an early, up-close look at the all-new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8, which led to some questions for Samsung's executives.

item.title: Power on... Marvel at San Diego Comic-Con 2026 — and what the comic book giant could show after the Avengers: Doomsday trailer's earlier-than-expected release
item.description: Ahead of Marvel's next San Diego Comic-Con presentation, Tom Power looks at the movies and shows we could soon learn more about.

item.title: Samsung passe à trois smartphones pliants : tout ce qu’il faut savoir sur les Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra et Z Flip 8 pour les précommandes
item.description: Ce n'est plus deux, mais trois formats de smartphones pliants que propose Samsung. Trois visions, trois façons de les utiliser, mais aussi trois prix différents. Les Galaxy Z Fold 8, Z Fold 8 Ultra et Z Flip 8 arrivent dès aujourd'hui en précommande avec quelques bonus, pour une sortie dès le début du mois prochain.

item.title: Des jeux Xbox jouable sur PC : Microsoft étend sa rétrocompatibilité au PC et Xbox Ally
item.description: Microsoft annonce une évolution majeure de son programme de rétrocompatibilité. Pour la première fois, des jeux Xbox sont jouables officiellement sur PC.

item.title: Apple prépare le plus vaste renouvellement de sa gamme mac depuis plusieurs années
item.description: Apple s'apprête à revoir intégralement sa gamme d'ordinateurs, avec de nouveaux MacBook Pro, iMac, MacBook Air, Mac mini, Mac Studio et un MacBook Neo, selon Bloomberg.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 vs Z Flip 7 : qu’est ce qui change réellement ?
item.description: Le nouveau Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 emprunte beaucoup d'éléments à son prédécesseur, mais est-ce suffisant pour s'en distinguer ? On a comparé le Galaxy Z Flip 8 et le Galaxy Z Flip 7.

item.title: Nothing Ear : les meilleurs écouteurs de 2024 notés 9/10 sont à -53 % sur Amazon
item.description: Excellente réduction de bruit active, son puissant et port confortable : les Nothing Ear ont tout pour plaire, surtout à ce prix. Lancés à 149,99 euros, ces écouteurs sans fil de 2024 tombent aujourd'hui à seulement 69 euros chez Amazon.

item.title: How the Galaxy Z Fold 8 and Z Flip 8 phones compare
item.description: Samsung's latest round of folding Galaxy Z phones and updated smartwatches were announced at its July 2026 Unpacked event and set to launch on August 7th. The Galaxy Z Flip 8, Fold 8, and Fold 8 Ultra don't seem geared toward people who bought last year's model; Aside from a few design updates and AI […]

item.title: Preorders for Samsung’s new Z Fold and Flip 8 come with up to $350 in gift cards
item.description: Samsung's newest foldables are here. At Galaxy Unpacked, the company announced the Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Z Fold 8, and Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. All three devices will be available on August 7th, but you can preorder them now starting at $1,199.99, $1,899.99, and $2,099.99, respectively. You probably noticed that Samsung's foldable lineup […]

item.title: Proton VPN's anti-censorship Stealth protocol finally lands on Linux
item.description: Proton VPN has officially launched its Stealth protocol in beta for Linux. Available now on the GUI app for Debian, Ubuntu, and Fedora, the obfuscation tool disguises VPN traffic to help users bypass strict online censorship and restrictive firewalls.

item.title: Scammers want your launch day money: this tool stops you falling foul of fake Samsung Galaxy Unpacked pre-orders
item.description: Go shopping with IPVanish's Secure Browser and steer clear of phishing and fakes

item.title: Surround sound speaker channel numbers explained: Bigger isn't always better
item.description: Here's what to pay attention to when building a home theater system.

item.title: If you pay a hacker’s ransom, chances are that they’ll come back for more
item.description: The long-held understanding among security researchers and network defenders is that it's impossible to negotiate in good faith with an extortion racket because there's no incentive for the other side to actually walk away.

item.title: New estimate suggests Valve's Steam Deck sales have decreased by 82%, and the reason shouldn't be a surprise
item.description: Price increases have ultimately spoiled the hype around the Steam Deck, and it explains why demand has reportedly fallen so low.

item.title: Quelles sont les meilleures clés USB (USB-A, USB-C) en 2026 ?
item.description: Besoin de stocker et transporter facilement des données en tout genre ? Rien de plus pratique qu’une bonne vieille clé USB. Nous avons choisi pour vous les meilleurs modèles de clés USB en 2026.

item.title: Google relance la bataille de l’IA avec 3 nouveaux modèles Gemini
item.description: Google a dévoilé trois nouveaux modèles d’IA : Gemini 3.6 Flash, Gemini 3.5 Flash-Lite et Gemini 3.5 Flash Cyber. Cette annonce s’inscrit dans un calendrier particulier pour l’entreprise.

item.title: The 5 biggest announcements at Samsung Galaxy Unpacked 2026 — including new phones, watches, and smart glasses
item.description: Samsung has launched the Galaxy Z Fold 8 series, the Galaxy Z Flip 8, new Galaxy Watches, and more.

item.title: Starbucks is bringing back the Unicorn Frappuccino (but only for one weekend)
item.description: Starbucks is bringing back the viral Unicorn Frappuccino for one weekend starting August 15.

item.title: Philips’ new smart toothbrush shows you where you didn’t properly brush
item.description: The latest addition to Philips' Sonicare line of smart electric toothbrushes could take the guesswork out of your brushing routine. The Next-Generation DiamondClean 9900 Prestige uses a third-generation AI model to provide real-time feedback on how you're brushing through a glowing ring on its base, while a touchscreen highlights areas of your mouth that may […]...

item.title: Tesla : pourquoi la France dit officiellement non au FSD
item.description: Philippe Tabarot a pris la peine d'expliquer en vidéo pourquoi la France refuse d'autoriser le FSD de Tesla. Ses arguments méritent qu'on les passe au crible : certains tiennent la route, d'autres beaucoup moins.

item.title: Amazon is giving away a free $50 gift card when you preorder the new Samsung Galaxy Watch 9
item.description: Preorders for the new Samsung Galaxy Watch 9 come with a free $50 Amazon gift card.

item.title: Apple finally patches Hide My Email security flaw — a year after it was first discovered
item.description: A bug that was first discovered in June 2025 was finally fixed in early July 2026.

item.title: Le Xiaomi Smart Band 11 Active se dévoile en avance, toujours à petit prix
item.description: Des revendeurs ont mis en ligne des informations concernant le prochain bracelet connecté abordable de Xiaomi : le Smart Band 11 Active.

item.title: Samsung finally reveals the Galaxy Z Fold 8 that will compete with the iPhone Ultra
item.description: Samsung's most confusingly named foldable is a brand-new, 4:3 tablet-style device meant to compete with an unannounced Apple phone.

item.title: Microsoft is bringing original Xbox games to PC
item.description: Microsoft is expanding its Xbox backward compatibility efforts today by bringing original Xbox games to PC. An early preview release will see four classic Xbox games available on PC today, as part of a bigger effort to bring more Xbox console games to PC in the future. The first four games are Blinx: The Time […]

item.title: Astronomers say there isnt a word for this weird new space object
item.description: An enormous object orbiting a brown dwarf in a star system 73 light-years away could be the strongest exomoon candidate yet.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked is almost here: Everything we expect from todays event
item.description: Samsung has a new batch of foldable phones and smartwatches coming July 22 at a Galaxy Unpacked event.

item.title: Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra vs Galaxy Z Fold 7 : tout ce que Samsung a changé sur son pliable ultra haut de gamme
item.description: Samsung range le Galaxy Z Fold 7 au placard et le remplace par un Galaxy Z Fold 8 Ultra. Mêmes airs, 200 euros de plus : on a comparé les deux fiches techniques, ligne par ligne.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Unpacked: Live updates from the foldable launch event
item.description: Samsung is hosting a Galaxy Unpacked even in London on July 22. Mashable will be there reporting live on all of the latest news and product launches.

item.title: OpenAI unveils Presence, a new platform that lets enterprises launch and manage realtime voice agents and chatbots
item.description: OpenAI has announced Presence, a new enterprise product for deploying and managing AI agents across customer-facing and internal business workflows. The offering is designed for eligible enterprise customers that want agents to answer questions, access company systems, take approved actions and escalate to human workers while operating under company-defined policies, permissions and evaluation standards.Presence is available immediately through a limited general availability program. OpenAI Forward Deployed Engineers (FDEs) and select global systems integrators lead deployments, and the produc...

item.title: Suspicious content? NordVPN's new AI bot will check it for you on WhatsApp, X, and Instagram
item.description: NordVPN's experimental hub, NordLabs, has launched NordBot, a free-to-use AI agent that acts as your personal scam checker for suspicious links, messages, and images on platforms like WhatsApp and Instagram.

item.title: T-Mobile is offering the new Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 for under $100 — no trade-in required
item.description: How to get the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 for under $100. Get the new Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8 for under $100 when you activate a line on an Experience More or Experience Beyond plan.

item.title: Everything announced at Samsung Galaxy Unpacked, including Z Fold 8, Z Flip 8, and smart glasses
item.description: In London, Samsung showed off three new foldables and two new watches for our pleasure.

item.title: Marketplace Cdiscount : comment ça marche et comment sont contrôlés les produits ? [Sponso]
item.description: Avec ses 10 000 vendeurs tiers professionnels et son offre de 20 millions de produits, Cdiscount est la première marketplace française. Pour savoir comment elle s’y prend, il faut aller chercher dans son organisation et dans des méthodes de gestion innovantes.

item.title: AMD commits up to $5 billion to Anthropic
item.description: AMD says it's going to invest up to $5 billion in Anthropic, while helping to expand the AI company's computing power, according to an announcement on Wednesday. As part of the new partnership, Anthropic will deploy up to 2 gigawatts of AMD's Instinct MI450 AI GPUs using the chipmaker's new Helios rack-scale system, as reported […]

item.title: Get a free $350 Amazon gift card when you preorder the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 phones — heres how to claim
item.description: Preordering the new Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 8 or Z Fold 8 Ultra at Amazon unlocks a free $350 gift card. Here's how to claim yours.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Watches now detect when youre going to get sick — but its not the first health tracker to do so
item.description: At Samsung Galaxy Unpacked 2026, Samsung debuted Vitals, a new feature on Samsung Watches that detects when you'll get sick.

item.title: Samsung Galaxy Glasses shown at Unpacked. See the smart glasses now.
item.description: At a July 22 Samsung Galaxy Unpacked event in London, the Korean tech company provided a closer look at its upcoming Galaxy Glasses on the Android XR platform.

item.title: The industry's most popular cinema camera gets a huge upgrade — and the Sony FX5's open gate video isn't even the best bit about the FX3 successor
item.description: The Sony FX3 became the most popular compact cinema cameras since its 2021 release, and the FX5 upgrades it in every meaningful way.

item.title: White House wants to shift billions of dollars of research funding away from ‘slow consensus peer review’ and into individual scientists and AI
item.description: Moving funding to individual scientists and AI could undermine US scientific credibility at home and abroad.

item.title: Why the future of AI depends on SMB adoption
item.description: There’s growing appetite for practical, accessible tools designed around the realities of running a small business rather than enterprise-scale workflows.

item.title: Tesla's Summer Update makes Grok the smart assistant it was always meant to be
item.description: Tesla's latest update makes Grok much more useful behind the wheel

item.title: You can stop LG monitors that are reportedly installing bloatware on your Windows 11 PC, but the fix shouldn't require this much effort
item.description: LG's changelog seemingly confirms that monitors install bloatware on Windows 11 PCs, and unfortunately, the fix is rather cumbersome.

item.title: Mattel and Hasbro’s first-ever collab brings My Little Pony and Polly Pocket together — here’s the scoop
item.description: Mattel and Hasbro teamed up for a My Little Pony x Polly Pocket Compact featuring classic characters, hidden details, and a lot of nostalgia.

item.title: Pre-order the new Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 at Amazon and get a free $200 gift card
item.description: Pre-order the upcoming Samsung Galaxy Z Flip8 for $1,199.99 at Amazon by August 6 and get a $200 gift card for free.

item.title: Lunettes IA, Galaxy Z Fold 8, Galaxy Z Flip 8, Galaxy Watch 9 : le récap de la conférence Samsung Galaxy Unpacked
item.description: C'est le grand jour pour Samsung. Ce mercredi 22 juillet 2026, la firme présente ses nouveaux smartphones Galaxy Z Fold 8 et Galaxy Z Flip 8. Elle présente également ses lunettes IA connectées et ses montres Galaxy Watch 9 et Galaxy Watch Ultra 2.
